if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND m.member_id = #{memberId} AND m.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbMemberSns :: selectById */ m.* , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_sc.code_label AS sns_channel_cd_nm FROM mb_member_sns m LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sc ON cd_sc.code_grp = 'SNS_CHANNEL' AND cd_sc.code_value = m.sns_channel_cd WHERE m.member_sns_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbMemberSns :: selectList */ m.* , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_sc.code_label AS sns_channel_cd_nm FROM mb_member_sns m LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sc ON cd_sc.code_grp = 'SNS_CHANNEL' AND cd_sc.code_value = m.sns_channel_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbMemberSns :: selectPageList */ m.* , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_sc.code_label AS sns_channel_cd_nm FROM mb_member_sns m LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sc ON cd_sc.code_grp = 'SNS_CHANNEL' AND cd_sc.code_value = m.sns_channel_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(m.*) /* base.ec.mb :: MbMemberSns :: selectPageCount */ FROM mb_member_sns m
